title: Cognizant Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Cognizant Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Cognizant Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
